steps.title: Find the tallest graph value
steps.content: The question asks for the highest percentage of lithium recovered in the tests. The needed value is the tallest bar on the graph, which is closest to 75 percent.

steps.title: Reject lower percentages
steps.content: Choice A is below the tallest value. Choices C and D are much farther below it. The remaining percentage matches the highest recovery shown by the graph. The answer is B.
